SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.examples

Class InletSeparatorSafetySystemExample.SafetyReport

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.examples.InletSeparatorSafetySystemExample.SafetyReport
Enclosing class:
InletSeparatorSafetySystemExample
public static class InletSeparatorSafetySystemExample.SafetyReport extends Object
Aggregated, immutable-from-the-outside view of the safety study results, returned by InletSeparatorSafetySystemExample.runFullDemonstration() and consumed by unit tests.
